sqlMap.insert: insert into mem_order values((select 'O'||to_char(sysdate,'yyyymmdd')||trim(to_char(nvl(max(to_number(substr(order_id,10))),0)+1,'0000')) as order_id from mem_order where order_id like 'O'|| to_char(sysdate,'yyyymmdd') || '%'), #mem_id#, sysdate, 0, null)
insert into detail_order values(#order_id#, #prod_id#, #del_option#, #del_quanity#, (select prod_price from prod where prod_id = #prod_id#))
sqlMap.delete: delete detail_order where order_id = #order_id# and prod_id = #prod_id#
sqlMap.select: select * from detail_order where order_id in (select order_id from mem_order where order_status is null and mem_id = #mem_id#) order by prod_id
sqlMap.insert: insert into detail_order(order_id, prod_id, del_quanity, del_price) values ((select order_id from mem_order where order_status is null and mem_id = #mem_id#), #prod_id#, 1, (select prod_price from prod where prod_id = #prod_id#))
sqlMap.select: select * from prod where prod_id IN (select prod_id from detail_order where order_id in (select order_id from mem_order where mem_id = #mem_id# and order_status is null)) order by prod_id
select * from mem_order where mem_id = #mem_id# and order_status is null
sqlMap.update: update detail_order set del_quanity = #del_quanity# where order_id in (select order_id from mem_order where order_id = #order_id# and mem_id = #mem_id#) and prod_id = #prod_id#
sqlMap.select: select * from prod where prod_id in (select prod_id from detail_order where order_id = #order_id#)
sqlMap.update: update mem_detail set mem_cupon = null where mem_id = #mem_id#
